title: IgnatiusHC's more ore
description:
Added a great many ores and alloys.
Additionally, there are more equipment and excavation levels.
body:
This mod adds over 40 new ores and numerous pieces of equipment, while also introducing mining levels exceeding the next tier's alloy (Level 5) mining requirement, with a maximum of Level 9.

The mod contains several special ores, which can be obtained as follows：
1. chlorophyll: Enchant your hoe with Element Collection, then left-click on leaves to have a chance of obtaining chlorophyll. Follow the recipe to craft disguised chlorophyll ore. This block periodically converts surrounding dark slate into inactive chlorophyll ingots.
2. twilight_cloud: After collecting the block, right-click on it while holding a diamond block.
3. profane_blood: Right-click on the glass template to collect crystals (currently has no use; will be added in future updates).
4. soul: The scythe must be enchanted with Soul Harvest, granting a chance to drop souls upon attacking creatures.

Equipment Material Grade Reference for Modules：
- 	           Front: Ore mining level    Back: Mining level

- Aluminum	             2	                      3
- Silver	             2	                      3
- Steel	              No ore	                  3
- Ice crystal	      No ore	              No tools
- Blazing fire        No ore	              No tools

- Ruby	                 2	                      3
- Holy steel	      No ore	                  3
- Poseidon	             3	                      4
- Twilight cloud	     3	                  4(No tools)

- This mod features an alloy furnace that must be placed in a fixed structure to function.
- First Level：      Second Level：       Third Level： 
-         XXX                  XXX                XXX
-         XXX                  X X                XXX
-         XXX                  XAX                XXX
- X is the alloy furnace frame.
- A is an alloy for the alloy melting furnace.

Add new effect：
1. Sanctuary: Every 5 seconds, grants 1 point of Satiety to all friendly units within range, restoring 2 HP.
2. Yang: When used in conjunction with Yin, if Yang exceeds Yin in duration, it restores 50 HP to the target entity.
3. Yin: When used in conjunction with Yang, if Yin exceeds Yang in duration, the target entity loses 50 HP.
4. Cold Resistant: Not afraid of the cold.
5. Fire Proof: Cannot catch fire itself, but remains vulnerable to burns from flames and scalding from molten rock.

This mod is my learning project.Inspiration comes from conversations with friends.We will continue to optimize and update in the future.
Special thanks to jiangtang_lala, Ignatius_HC, mengmaomi, Mayple233, and anc_Wild_Uni for their invaluable artistic contributions and inspiration!!!
Finally, all songs on the album within this module are original compositions by jiangtang_lala and performed by her personally.
ps:Actually, all the mod names are derived from Ignatius_HC's ID.(
